Residential Communities

Security operations for the places people call home.

You manage guards, cameras, visitors, and equipment across a community of hundreds of families. SYAG gives you one unified platform for all of it — built specifically for the way gated communities and residential facilities in the Gulf and MEA region operate.

Request a demo →

How facility security actually works today

Most residential facility security managers operate with a combination of:

  • A guard management app (or no app — just phone calls)
  • A separate VMS or NVR for cameras
  • A paper visitor register at the gate
  • A spreadsheet or nothing for asset tracking
  • WhatsApp groups for guard communications and supervisor alerts

Nothing connects. When an incident happens at 2am, you're calling guards, checking camera footage on a separate screen, and writing an incident report after the fact.

This is the problem SYAG was built to solve.

One platform. Everything connected.

Guard management

Your guards operate from the SYAG mobile app. You see every guard's live position on a map of your facility. Patrols are verified by checkpoint scans. Incidents are filed from the field with photos and GPS.

Camera events that act

When your camera detects motion in the car park at 3am, SYAG doesn't just record it — it creates an incident, notifies your supervisor, and dispatches the nearest guard. Automatically.

Visitor management that works the way residents expect

Residents pre-register visitors online. A QR pass is sent to the visitor via WhatsApp. The guard scans it at the gate in 10 seconds. Overstays are flagged automatically. No paper forms.

Asset tracking without the spreadsheet

Your cameras, vehicles, guard equipment, and generators are all registered in SYAG. Maintenance alerts come to you before equipment fails.

Built for how you actually operate

SYAG is designed specifically for the gated community and residential facility context in the MEA and GCC region:

  • Arabic + English — platform and mobile apps available in both languages, RTL supported
  • 4G mobile-first — guards work over standard cellular data, no Wi-Fi infrastructure required
  • Works on affordable devices — no expensive hardware required for guards
  • MEA-calibrated pricing — built for facility security budgets, not enterprise IT budgets
  • Compliance-ready — architecture supports Saudi NCA and UAE IA requirements

What SYAG replaces — and what it costs

What you have today Monthly cost estimate SYAG replaces it with
Guard management app {$X–Y}/mo Guard Management module
Separate VMS / NVR {$X–Y}/mo Camera & VMS module
Visitor register (paper / manual) Staff time Visitor Management module
Asset spreadsheet Staff time Asset Management module
Separate IoT monitoring {$X–Y}/mo IoT Devices module
Total fragmented stack {$2,000–5,000}/mo SYAG — from {price}/mo
